alaOccurrenceBoundary.reason: Species-level ALA occurrence counts are withheld while exact dataset citation rights remain unresolved; a missing displayed count is not evidence of biological absence.

firstNationsNameBoundary.reason: No language-name assertion has an authorized public source in this pack; this is not evidence that no First Nations names exist.

referenceBoundary.reason: Reference counts are provider-asserted workflow diagnostics, not verified identities, model votes, or a quality estimate.
